caption: A man wearing a large, grey, peaked wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio. He wears black headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow garment with the text "LEE" visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left says "PODCAST" below a symbol and "STALID", and another on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY" above "LIKE SUBSCRIBE". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, looking slightly downward and to the side with a neutral expression. He makes subtle movements with his head and mouth as if speaking, while the camera and background remain static.
